title: Snowpiercer (2013) - Planes! Trains! And Automobiles!
actors: Matt Detisch, Alex Logan, Michael Rocco
plot: All aboard. We're piercing snow on this deep-dive into the masterworks of genius filmmaker Bong Joon-ho. Chris Evans, Tilda Swinton, Ed Harris, Jamie Bell, Song Kang-ho, John Hurt, and Octavia Spencer chugga-chugga choo-choo into ...
